reviews.comment: Brian Ennis Was a great instructor. Straight to the point instructions. Time to ask questions. Very thorough. I usually hate this class, but he was very accommodating to me and I appreciate it.

reviews.comment: Brian was a great instructor,  really took his time and explained everything thoroughly. I highly recommend 910 CPR!

reviews.comment: They are AWESOME!!—have taken my CPR classes with them for years. Always offers a tremendous amount of classes; several dates and times… which makes it sooo convenient! They provide a fantastic environment where you can actually have fun while learning!! I highly recommend!! Brian (our instructor) was great!!! They are the best!! 👍

reviews.comment: Class was great! Not too long, the instructor is very friendly and helpful the class size makes it very personal. So glad I went with them for my recertification for nursing school. 10/10 would recommend.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much, Krista, for the 5-star review! We’re so glad you had a great experience with 910CPR. If you ever need a renewal or know someone starting a new job or program, we’re here to help. Thanks again for choosing us!

reviews.comment: Staff were great to work with. Personable and knowledgeable. Great experience!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you! We truly appreciate your kind words and 5-star review. We're glad you found the class reasonably priced and our staff knowledgeable and personable. It was a pleasure having you for your BLS/CPR training—thank you for choosing 910CPR!
